questions.prompt: Which artefacts together provide a defensible audit trail for an approval request? (Select all that apply.)
choices: The original request in the Response Center
The reviewer's username on the resulting policy
The PSA ticket linking the request to a customer ticket
The justification in the policy notes
The customer comms confirming an out-of-scope authorisation
A guess at what the user might have wanted
questions.explanation: The first five together form the chain of custody auditors and IR teams want. Anything reconstructed after the fact is a sign the trail is broken.
